categories.label: Identity
categories.notes: Use verified profile fields.

categories.label: Contact
categories.notes: Use confirmed application contact details.

categories.label: Work Authorization
examplePrompts: Are you legally authorized to work?
Can you provide proof of employment eligibility?
categories.notes: Ask explicitly during intake. Do not infer.

categories.label: Sponsorship
examplePrompts: Will you require sponsorship now or in the future?
categories.notes: Ask explicitly during intake. Do not infer.

categories.label: Citizenship
examplePrompts: Are you a lawful permanent resident?
categories.notes: Use only when required or explicitly configured.

categories.label: Compensation
categories.notes: Use configured compensation strategy. Salary history is manual only.

categories.label: Availability
categories.notes: Use approved scheduling preferences.

categories.label: Location And Travel
categories.notes: Apply campaign location and travel rules.

categories.label: Education
categories.notes: Use verified education facts only.

categories.label: Experience
categories.notes: Use verified or conservatively calculated experience only.

categories.label: Certification
categories.notes: Never claim unverified credentials.

categories.label: License
categories.notes: Use verified active status only.

categories.label: Physical Requirement
examplePrompts: Can you stand for long periods?
Can you perform essential duties with or without accommodation?
categories.notes: Pause unless explicitly configured.

categories.label: Drug Testing
examplePrompts: Are you willing to complete a drug screen?
Can you pass a drug test?
categories.notes: Use explicit user preference only.

categories.label: Background And Consumer Reports
categories.notes: Consent questions require clear user approval.

categories.label: Criminal History
categories.notes: Jurisdiction-sensitive. Do not automate by default.

categories.label: Military And Veteran Status
categories.notes: Voluntary and sensitive. Never infer.

categories.label: Disability And Accommodation
categories.notes: Voluntary and sensitive. Never infer.

categories.label: Voluntary Demographics
categories.notes: Use only configured user preference.

categories.label: References
categories.notes: Submit only approved references.

categories.label: Assessment
categories.notes: Treat as a separate workflow. Do not fabricate.

categories.label: Custom Written Answer
examplePrompts: Why do you want this job?
categories.notes: Draft from verified facts and require review by default.

categories.label: Account Creation
categories.notes: Use configured account rules and vault references.

categories.label: Security Question
categories.notes: Store only through the vault boundary.

categories.label: Final Attestation
categories.notes: Do not submit unless final submission rules explicitly allow it.
